message:
Fix waitid missing 5th rusage arg and serialize fork+wait-any tests

1. waitid syscall: Pass the required 5th argument (rusage pointer as
   null) to SYS_waitid. The kernel expects 5 arguments; omitting the
   last one left rusage uninitialized on the kernel side, which could
   cause undefined behavior on some architectures.

2. Test reliability: Add a FORK_WAIT_ANY_LOCK mutex to serialize tests
   that call fork() then wait/wait3 with pid=-1. Without serialization,
   concurrent tests could reap each other's children, causing sporadic
   failures in cargo test --jobs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
